sections.label: THINKING
sections.content: Interesting! Clicking on the scattered dot at (37, 18) caused a change - I can see a pink/magenta block appeared near the blob! Let me check the segmentation to understand what happened.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
for n in current_frame.segmentation['nodes']:
    if n['color'] not in ['B', 'W', 'c', 'G']:
        center = (sum(p[0] for p in n['boundary'])/len(n['boundary']),
                  sum(p[1] for p in n['boundary'])/len(n['boundary']))
        if center[0] > 5:
            print(f"Node: color={n['color']}, pixels={n['pixels']}, center~({center[0]:.0f},{center[1]:.0f})")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>

So the game-over state isn't truly terminal - I can recover the blocks by clicking on the scattered dots!

- Magenta block: 4 pixels at (36, 18)
- 7 scattered sky blue dots

Let me first recover all the blocks by clicking on the scattered dots, then figure out the goal.
